Dashboard layout.agent_card_content: Status badge (colored, maps to AgentState) + task description (truncated) + cumulative cost + expand button for output (AGT-01)

Spawn dialog design.dialog_fields: Model (dropdown from list_models) + Task (text) + Budget (optional dollars, empty = unlimited). Worktree auto-assigned from task name — new branch created automatically.
Spawn dialog design.model_picker: Dropdown using existing list_models command — same list as Phase 4 chat top bar.
Spawn dialog design.budget_enforcement: Rust backend: extend spawn_agent to accept optional budget param. Runtime halts agent when budget exceeded, same as CLI --budget flag. Emits AgentEvent::StateChanged(Failed) + error message.

Agent output expansion.expansion_behavior: Clicking expand on an agent card replaces the center ChatPane with that agent's conversation view. Reuses all existing Message/ToolBlock/MessageList/DiffView components — no new rendering infrastructure.
Agent output expansion.interaction_mode: Read-only — no input field in agent view. Observation only. Chat pane = human sessions; agent view = monitoring.
Agent output expansion.default_center: When no agent is selected/expanded, center shows the regular human chat session. Closing agent view returns to chat.

questions.answer: Status badge + task + cost + expand button
